◎简　　介  

　　David Gladwell is perhaps best-known for his celebrated work as editor on Lindsay Anderson's If.... and O Lucky Man! Requiem for a Village, along with the four exquisite and startling short films also included in this BFI Flipside Dual Format Edition, reveal him to be an unfairly overlooked director of ground-breaking work.The idyllic, rural past of a Suffolk village rises to ...
